RegLoan Bank — Underwriting Policy & Rate Sheet Document POL-0004 Page 2 of 2 APR Rate Matrix by FICO x LTV (cont.) Loan-to-Value tier APR FICO Band LTV <=80% LTV 81-90% LTV 91-100% LTV 101-110% LTV 111-120% 700-739 9.64% 11.81% 8.29% 7.38% 11.31% 740-779 12.08% 13.27% 9.39% 5.06% 6.78% 780+ 4.64% 4.42% 4.96% 11.39% 6.78% Verify income — UW
